content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

In a 200 m race, A beats B by 50 meters. Also, at the finish line, A was 10 seconds ahead of B. Find the time taken by A to complete the race.

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

B covers 50 m in 10 seconds.
Speed of B = 50 m / 10 s = 5 m/s
Time required by B to complete 200 m = 200 m / 5 m/s = 40 s
A is 10 seconds ahead, so A takes 40 - 10 = 30 seconds to complete the race.
